locations.name: Kokiri Forest
locations.description: The starting area of the game where Link lives. Home to the Kokiri and the Great Deku Tree.

locations.name: Great Deku Tree
locations.description: A large tree that serves as a guardian of the Kokiri Forest. The first dungeon of the game is located inside.

locations.name: Hyrule Field
locations.description: A vast open field that connects various locations in Hyrule. The main hub for travel in the game.

locations.name: Castle Town
locations.description: The main town in Hyrule, featuring shops, a market, and the castle where Princess Zelda resides.

locations.name: Hyrule Castle
locations.description: The castle where Princess Zelda lives, located near Castle Town. Link visits here early in the game.

locations.name: Death Mountain
locations.description: A volcanic mountain located north of Hyrule Field. Home to the Gorons and the Fire Temple.

locations.name: Goron City
locations.description: A city built within Death Mountain, home to the Goron tribe.

locations.name: Dodongo's Cavern
locations.description: A dungeon located inside Death Mountain, the second dungeon of the game.

locations.name: Zora's River
locations.description: A river that flows to Zora's Domain. Home to the Zoras and several mini-games.

locations.name: Zora's Domain
locations.description: The home of the Zoras, located in the northeast of Hyrule. A water-filled area that includes the Water Temple.

locations.name: Inside Jabu-Jabu's Belly
locations.description: The third dungeon of the game, located inside the giant fish, Lord Jabu-Jabu.

locations.name: Kakariko Village
locations.description: A village south of Death Mountain. Home to various NPCs and shops.

locations.name: Graveyard
locations.description: Located in Kakariko Village, the graveyard is home to several tombstones and Dampé the Gravekeeper.

locations.name: Bottom of the Well
locations.description: A mini-dungeon located in the Kakariko Village graveyard. Contains hidden secrets and treasures.

locations.name: Forest Temple
locations.description: The first adult dungeon located in the Sacred Forest. Contains the Forest Medallion.

locations.name: Lake Hylia
locations.description: A large body of water located south of Hyrule Field. Home to the Fishing Pond and several secrets.

locations.name: Water Temple
locations.description: The second adult dungeon located in Lake Hylia. Contains the Water Medallion.

locations.name: Gerudo Valley
locations.description: A desert area west of Hyrule Field, leading to the Gerudo Fortress and Gerudo Desert.

locations.name: Gerudo Fortress
locations.description: Home to the Gerudo tribe. A mini-dungeon that includes several stealth segments.

locations.name: Spirit Temple
locations.description: The third adult dungeon located in the Gerudo Desert. Contains the Spirit Medallion.

locations.name: Shadow Temple
locations.description: A dark and eerie dungeon located in Kakariko Village. Contains the Shadow Medallion.

locations.name: Ganon's Castle
locations.description: The final dungeon of the game, located in the center of Hyrule Field. Home to the final battle against Ganon.

locations.name: Temple of Time
locations.description: The sacred temple that holds the Master Sword and the Door of Time.

locations.name: Lost Woods
locations.description: A mystical forest filled with confusing paths. Leads to the Sacred Forest Meadow.

locations.name: Sacred Forest Meadow
locations.description: A peaceful area within the Lost Woods, home to Saria and the entrance to the Forest Temple.

locations.name: Desert Colossus
locations.description: A desert area leading to the Spirit Temple. Contains several secrets and mini-games.

locations.name: Haunted Wasteland
locations.description: A mysterious and eerie area south of Gerudo Valley. Home to the Requiem of Spirit song.

locations.name: Ice Cavern
locations.description: A cold dungeon located north of Zora's Domain. Contains several ice puzzles.

locations.name: Hyrule Castle Town Market
locations.description: The main shopping area in Castle Town, filled with shops, an inn, and several NPCs.

locations.name: Lon Lon Ranch
locations.description: A ranch located west of Hyrule Field. Home to cows, Epona, and several mini-games.

locations.name: Fishing Pond
locations.description: A pond located in Lake Hylia where players can participate in fishing mini-games.
